name: Grand Spiritual Art - Ichirin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: Negate your opponent's first monster effect that resolves each turn while you control a Spellcaster monster with 1500 DEF. During your Main Phase: You can reveal 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand, add 1 monster with the same Attribute but with 1500 ATK/200 DEF, from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, shuffle the revealed card into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Grand Spiritual Art - Ichirin" once per turn.
eff: Negate your opponent's first monster effect that resolves each turn while you control a Spellcaster monster with 1500 DEF. During your Main Phase: You can reveal 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand, add 1 monster with the same Attribute but with 1500 ATK/200 DEF, from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, shuffle the revealed card into the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Grand Spiritual Art - Ichirin" once per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: Spirit Charmers (All-Foil Edition)

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
